title: Wild Animal Farming & More-than-Human Governance in China
summary: Ethnographic and policy work on China's wild animal farming sector, the more-than-human practices that sustain it, and the post-COVID reforms reshaping how the state sorts wildlife from livestock.

title: Ecological Civilization & the Climate-Forestry Nexus
summary: Investigates how China's "ecological civilization" frame is constructed at the intersection of climate policy and forestry governance, and how it translates ecological values into administrative categories.

title: Nature-Based Solutions in the Global South
summary: Follows the export of "nature-based solutions" from international policy frameworks into specific landscapes across Asia, Africa, and Latin America, with a focus on how Chinese actors shape that travel.
